notes: Adds clear non-advice wording to Spending Plan Assessment.
Adds a fuller Spending Plan and financial advice policy to About & Privacy.
Clarifies that AP and money-flow suggestions are generated only from user-entered figures.
Adds signposting language for users experiencing debt, bills, repayments or urgent money pressure.
release_notes: Adds clear non-advice wording to Spending Plan and About & Privacy, and clarifies that AP and money-flow suggestions are generated from user-entered figures and should be reviewed before changing bank payments.
label: Spending Plan non-advice policy
